description: The cardano-node configuration. Each component's keys may be given directly at the top level (single-file form) or, per component, under that component's section key as a path to a sub-file, an inline object, or a non-empty list of paths/objects deep-merged in order (split-file form); the two forms may be mixed. The whole document may also be wrapped in a { Version, Configuration } envelope. Mandatory keys (in the single-file form): ByronGenesisFile, ShelleyGenesisFile, AlonzoGenesisFile, ConwayGenesisFile, LastKnownBlockVersion-Major and LastKnownBlockVersion-Minor.

delay.description: Delay, in seconds, applied once the soft limit is reached
delay.title: delay

hardLimit.description: Hard limit on the number of connections
hardLimit.title: hardLimit

softLimit.description: Soft limit on the number of connections
softLimit.title: softLimit

AlonzoGenesisHash.description:
Hash of the file
Blake2b_256 hash
AlonzoGenesisHash.title: AlonzoGenesisHash

ByronGenesisHash.description:
Hash of the file
Blake2b_256 hash
ByronGenesisHash.title: ByronGenesisHash

CheckpointsFileHash.description:
Hash of the file
Blake2b_256 hash
CheckpointsFileHash.title: CheckpointsFileHash

Configuration.description: When using the { Version, Configuration } envelope, the configuration object goes here (the same shape as this schema).
Configuration.title: Configuration

anyOf.description: Path to a file holding the Consensus section
anyOf.title: File path

ConsensusMode.description: Which consensus mode to run (PraosMode or GenesisMode)
ConsensusMode.title: ConsensusMode

BlockFetchGracePeriod.description: Grace period, in seconds, for BlockFetch
BlockFetchGracePeriod.title: BlockFetchGracePeriod

BucketCapacity.description: Token bucket capacity for the LoP
BucketCapacity.title: BucketCapacity

BucketRate.description: Token bucket refill rate for the LoP
BucketRate.title: BucketRate

CSJJumpSize.description: Size, in slots, of ChainSync jumps
CSJJumpSize.title: CSJJumpSize

EnableLoEAndGDD.description: Enable the Limit on Eagerness and the Genesis Density Disconnection
EnableLoEAndGDD.title: EnableLoEAndGDD

GDDRateLimit.description: Rate limit, in seconds, for the GDD
GDDRateLimit.title: GDDRateLimit
